fields.options:
Production Entry

Daily production sheet to record planned and actual output per station. Select a Job Card in each child row. On submit, Job Card totals are automatically updated.

fields.label: Amended From
fields.description: If this entry was amended from another Production Entry, the original is linked here. This is set automatically by the system.

fields.label: Series
fields.description: Auto-generated document number series. Format: PE-2026-00001. Cannot be changed after saving.

fields.label: Production Date
fields.description: The date this production was carried out. Defaults to today. All actual line entries in this sheet are recorded against this date.

fields.label: Station
fields.description: The machine or station where production is taking place, e.g. Flexo 1, Slitter 2. Optional grouping field for the daily sheet.

fields.label: Shift
fields.description: The shift during which production occurred, e.g. Day, Night, Morning. Helps in shift-wise reporting.

fields.label: Supervisor
fields.description: Name of the production supervisor overseeing this shift/station.

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Any general notes about this production entry, e.g. machine issues, material changes, shift handover notes.

fields.options:
Production Planning

Add rows for each Job Card you plan to produce today. Select the Job Card first — order qty, produced qty, and balance will auto-populate from the Job Card. Then enter your planned quantity and target date.

fields.label: Planning Lines
fields.description: Each row represents a planned production run for a specific Job Card. Multiple Job Cards can be planned in a single entry.

fields.options:
Actual Production

Record what was actually produced. Select the Job Card, enter Good Qty and Waste Qty. Running Balance is auto-calculated as: Balance Qty − Good Qty. On submit, these totals update the Job Card automatically.

fields.label: Actual Lines
fields.description: Each row records actual production output for a Job Card. Good qty drives the Job Card balance; waste qty is tracked separately.

fields.options:
Entry Summary

Auto-calculated totals across all actual production lines in this entry. These are recalculated every time you save.

fields.label: Total Good Qty
fields.description: Sum of all Good Qty values from the Actual Lines table. This is the total usable output from this production entry.

fields.label: Total Waste Qty
fields.description: Sum of all Waste Qty values from the Actual Lines table. Includes rejects, misprints, damaged sheets, etc.
